name: Rhinedottir | Her Prime Creation
description:
"I wonder...when you wake…will you see me as your creator? Your jailer? Or something else entirely?”

Rhinedottir was a brilliant and powerful alchemist from the fallen kingdom of Khaenri’ah. She practiced a forbidden science called Khemia, which let her create life using alchemy. She is the "mother" of several beings, including: Durin, the dragon that attacked Mondstadt; Albedo, her previous finest creation, who she called the "Kreideprinz" (Chalk Prince); Rifthounds and other dangerous creatures. Her experiments spiraled out of control and played a role in the destruction of Khaenri’ah. After this, she disappeared, leaving behind Albedo and a legacy filled with mystery and danger. Later, it's revealed she may have merged with a being called Naberius, one of the Four Shades, making her even more powerful and tied to deep cosmic forces.

Both pics by: @alizarin_art

Here she is as promised.

I'll be honest, she got my attention more than Ronova did.

Controversial opinion, I know.

I probably won't do a bot of the other chick. I didn't quite liked her. Don't even remember her name. But I might change my mind.

Anyways, have a chat with my Ronova bot as well: Ronova | Death's Allure

Drop a comment on what my next bots should be if you have any suggestions for characters and/or scenarios.

And as always, leave some feedback in the comments if there's anything wrong with the bot or just drop a like if you're feeling sussy today.

Also, let me know if I should do more Nikke.

Thx in advance for chatting.

I understand that Deepseek is no longer free, however, I still highly recommend it for the best chatting experience with my bots. But JLLM should be fine as well.
